Crafted with
Intention

UI/UX case studies and creative explorations that push the boundaries of digital design.

001 — UI/UX Case Study

LGU Milaor Scholarship Management System

A comprehensive UI/UX design case study focused on streamlining administrative workflows and student applications for the LGU Milaor Municipal Scholarship Program — MiSkolar.

Figma Dashboard Wireframing User Research
View Case Study
002 — Web Design Exploration

Demon Slayer Web Layouts

A creative exploration featuring 13 unique, high-fidelity web layouts inspired by the Demon Slayer anime series — showcasing mastery of diverse layout structures including Hero, Magazine, Split-Screen, Asymmetrical, and more.
